pr.title: RFC: A framework for deciding the n-gram question

output.summary: Eval-time n-gram caching mixes collided buckets to satisfy min-count thresholds, unlocking BPB gains while exposing 272MB eval-state growth and prompting policy fixes.
techniques: eval-time n-gram cache using collisions to cross min-count thresholds
all-reduce syncing of per-GPU hash table deltas
policy proposals capping eval-time state and per-token overhead
